## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run lint` — 0 errors
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` — passes (node + worker)
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` — green, thresholds met
- [ ] New behavior has tests
- [ ] New Procore/Salesforce contracts tagged `[NEEDS LIVE VERIFICATION]` if unverified
- [ ] No secrets committed
